content.en:
Ye Tian roughly knew the location of the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit from the mouth of the Lord of Corrosion, and shuttled towards that location.

Soon.

Ye Tian found the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit.

Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit is not one, but three.

In fact, the number of Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruits must be more than three, but the Nameless Kun is afraid that it often devours the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruits, if it weren't for the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruits, which would not be of much help to the Nameless Kun now, otherwise there would be no Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruits left here.

Ye Tian immediately took the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit here.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to other places to look for treasures.

Time is limited, so he naturally wants to get more benefits and resources.

Along the way, Ye Tian found a lot of good things, but he wouldn't collect resources that were useless to him, otherwise it would be a waste of time.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian collected more and more resources, and the harvest was extremely rich.

"Extreme Matter!"

Ye Tian became excited, and he sensed a lot of polar substances.

I saw that somewhere in the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, Ye Tian sensed drops of golden water, these golden droplets were flowing, as if they were like life, but in fact they were not life, but a kind of polar substance.

"Make a drop of water!"

Ye Tian knew their names when he saw them.

The speed of the Pole Creation Water Droplet was incomparably fast, shuttling everywhere in this river, but Ye Tian's speed was even faster, and he easily grabbed a Pole Creation Water Droplet.

"This droplet of pole-making water contains not much substance, but there are enough droplets of pole-making water here!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian continued to collect the Extreme Water Droplets here, collecting them as fast as he could, because his other copy body and will clone were about to be unable to hold on.

As time passed, a drop of Extreme Water fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's will clone fell into the hands of the Nameless Kun, and only the copy body was still holding on.

"This clone of the will that replicates the body is going to help!"

Ye Tian decided.

This will allow him to hold on for a while longer, allowing him to find more resources and treasures.

Wow!

This will clone went to help, and Ye Tian's duplicate body was here alone to collect the Extreme Water Droplets.

It didn't take long for the droplets to be collected.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to look for other resources, but also found a lot of treasures that could improve his body and will.

Just when the duplicate body and the second will clone were about to be unable to hold on, Ye Tian left the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void and returned to the outside world.

The nameless kun would not leave his territory, so Ye Tian could breathe a sigh of relief.

I have to say that today's nameless kun is not an existence that he can resist, the gap in strength is too big, and he has no power to resist at all, so he can only sacrifice his life to delay time.

"Let's go back first!"

Ye Tian returned to the vicinity of the Origin Realm Sea.

Subsequently, he began his retreat.

This time, he needs to make good use of all these resources, as well as those Pole Creation Water Drops and Underworld Golden Fruits, maybe there is hope to break a Pole Creation Chain again.

Time passes slowly.

A large amount of resources were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, and the half-step perfect will of the Pole Creation Realm and the half-step perfect control body of the Extreme Creation Realm were all improving, and Ye Tian was also absorbing those Pole Creation Water Droplets and the Underworld Golden Fruit, and the fourth Pole Creation Chain was gradually relaxed, and there were signs of breaking.

After about 300,000 eternal years, Ye Tian had refined all the resources, and even the pole-making materials had been exhausted, but he still hadn't broken the fourth pole-making chain.

At this time, the most important resource in Ye Tian's hand still had three Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruits left.

"The Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit can help a primary-level perfection controller break the shackles and be promoted to a medium-level perfection master, and it also has an incomparably powerful effect on a half-step perfection controller like me. Once I take the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit, my will and my body of control should be greatly improved. Moreover, the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit has the effect of enhancing the body of control and the potential of the will, so it can help those who are at the primary level of perfection to break the shackles. "

Ye Tian decided to take the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit, although it was a bit of a waste for the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm to take the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit, but if he could improve his strength, even if it was a waste, it would be worth it.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took a Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit.

Rumble!!!!

Extremely terrifying energy emerged, refining Ye Tian's body and will in a very violent way.

Moreover, Ye Tian's life level was also forcibly raised by a small amount, which was the powerful effect of the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit.

Gradually, Ye Tian's will and controlling body improved a lot, and it wasn't until a long time later that this Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit really ran out of energy.

At this time, Ye Tian's strength improved a lot.

"Sure enough, it's a bit of a waste, the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit is more suitable for the primary perfect controller to break the shackles, that is the most useful, but it can improve the strength. "

Ye Tian also found that the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit also helped to break the fourth pole-making chain, but it was only a collateral effect, making it easier for Ye Tian to break the fourth pole-making chain.

Originally, Ye Tian was about to break the fourth pole-making chain, but now after refining the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit, there was only a little bit left before breaking the fourth pole-making chain.

After another period of time, Ye Tian decided to take a Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit again.

Although the effect of taking the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit this time was not as good as the last time, his purpose was to break the fourth chain of Extreme Creation, and if it was really broken, his strength would inevitably increase again.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian directly swallowed another Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit, absorbing the energy of refining the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit.

Bang!!!

The energy of the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit continued to refine Ye Tian's will and control his body, and it also affected the fourth Pole Creation Chain.

Ye Tian took the opportunity to impact the fourth pole-making chain, impacting again and again.

After impacting millions of times, the fourth Pole Creation Chain was finally broken by Ye Tian.

When the fourth Pole Creation Chain was broken, the Pole Creation Origin Substance that the Pole Creation Chain turned into was integrated into Ye Tian's control body, making Ye Tian's control body even stronger.

"I've improved my strength a lot!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With his current strength, he will definitely not be able to defeat the Nameless Kun, but it will be difficult for the Nameless Kun to kill him.

"The last time the copying body and the will clone dragged on for a long time, there are still a lot of resources in the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void that have not been collected, so I will collect some more this time!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, Ye Tian came to the Nine Rivers Void again.
